title: V5 migration banner component for terminal relocation notification
purpose: Displays a one-time welcome banner after v6 upgrade to inform users about terminal relocation to the Shell drawer, with dismissal persistence.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named MigrationBannerV5 that uses UI store hooks to check dismissal status and handle dismissal, rendering nothing when dismissed.

steps.content: Read the dismissal status from the UI store.
IF the banner has been dismissed, return null to render nothing.
ELSE render the banner with instructions for accessing the relocated terminal.
Include a dismiss button that calls the store's dismissal handler.
